==================
Compact class body without newlines
==================

class Db { fun open() {} fun run() {} }

---

(source_file
  (class_declaration
    name: (identifier)
    (class_body
      (function_declaration
        name: (identifier)
        (function_value_parameters)
        (function_body
          (block)))
      (function_declaration
        name: (identifier)
        (function_value_parameters)
        (function_body
          (block))))))
